## Raw data (`raw/glofas/`)

Format: **GRIB** (`.grib`), readable via `cfgrib` / `xarray`. All files expose a single variable:

| variable | long name | units |
|---|---|---|
| `dis24` | Mean discharge in the last 24 hours | m³ s⁻¹ |

Dimensions vary by subdir:

| subdir | dimensions | notes |
|---|---|---|
| `reanalysis/` | `time` | daily analysis at a single gauge point (lat/lon) |
| `reforecast/` | `number`, `time`, `step` | 10 ensemble members; `time` = issue date; `step` = lead days within the batch |
| `reforecast_country/` | `number`, `time`, `step` | same as reforecast, country-wide spatial extent |
| `monitoring/` | `step` | 5-day forecast issued on the file date |

## Processed data (`processed/glofas/`)

Format: **Parquet** (`.parquet`), readable via `ocha-stratus` / `pandas`. Extracted and flattened from the raw GRIBs.

| file | rows | size | columns |
|---|--:|--:|---|
| `glofas_reanalysis_makurdi.parquet` | 9,844 | 144.3 KB | `time` (datetime64[ns]), `dis24` (float32) |
| `glofas_reanalysis_wuroboki.parquet` | 16,741 | 222.8 KB | `time` (datetime64[ns]), `dis24` (float32) |
| `glofas_reforecast_makurdi_ensemble.parquet` | 358,400 | 1.9 MB | `number` (int64), `time` (datetime64[ns]), `valid_time` (datetime64[ns]), `dis24` (float32), `leadtime` (int64) |
| `reforecast_country_progress.parquet` | 9 | 3.6 KB | `product_type` (object), `year` (int64), `lt_start` (int64), `lt_end` (int64), `downloaded_at` (object) |
| `wuroboki_glofas_reforecast_ens.parquet` | 267,050 | 2.6 MB | `number` (int64), `time` (datetime64[ns]), `dis24` (float32), `valid_time` (datetime64[ns]), `leadtime` (int64) |

### Schemas

**`glofas_reanalysis_makurdi.parquet`, `glofas_reanalysis_wuroboki.parquet`**

| column | dtype | description |
|---|---|---|
| `time` | `datetime64[ns]` | forecast issue date (or analysis date for reanalysis) |
| `dis24` | `float32` | mean river discharge in the last 24 hours (m³/s) |

**`glofas_reforecast_makurdi_ensemble.parquet`**

| column | dtype | description |
|---|---|---|
| `number` | `int64` | ensemble member index |
| `time` | `datetime64[ns]` | forecast issue date (or analysis date for reanalysis) |
| `valid_time` | `datetime64[ns]` | validity date of the forecast |
| `dis24` | `float32` | mean river discharge in the last 24 hours (m³/s) |
| `leadtime` | `int64` | lead time in days |

**`reforecast_country_progress.parquet`**

| column | dtype | description |
|---|---|---|
| `product_type` | `object` | GloFAS product type (e.g. ensemble) |
| `year` | `int64` | year of the reforecast |
| `lt_start` | `int64` | leadtime window start (hours) |
| `lt_end` | `int64` | leadtime window end (hours) |
| `downloaded_at` | `object` | ISO timestamp when this batch was downloaded |

**`wuroboki_glofas_reforecast_ens.parquet`**

| column | dtype | description |
|---|---|---|
| `number` | `int64` | ensemble member index |
| `time` | `datetime64[ns]` | forecast issue date (or analysis date for reanalysis) |
| `dis24` | `float32` | mean river discharge in the last 24 hours (m³/s) |
| `valid_time` | `datetime64[ns]` | validity date of the forecast |
| `leadtime` | `int64` | lead time in days |
